body_txt: Not to be confused with Creative Closing Credits or simply running credits over The Tag , The Stinger , or the Hilarious Outtakes , a credits gag involves a show making jokes within, about or upon the credits themselves. These may be a form of Couch Gag in a television series. Common versions include: This is not just limited to the actual credits though, a film/series title gets this treatment too. See also Logo Joke , Character as Himself and Special Edition Title .
